flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lawrence Technological University fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (24.2% → 18.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lawrence Technological University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.7k → $44.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lawrence Technological University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.7k → $44.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lawrence Technological University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.7k).
